title: US job-cut announcements in tech keep rising with AI adoption

content:

title: OpenAI buys tech talk show TBPN as it builds out communication strategy
description: OpenAI has acquired TBPN, a Silicon Valley tech talk show, as it looks to expand its communication strategy and engage audiences around artificial intelligence.
content:
OpenAI has acquired technology talk show TBPN as it looks to refine how it communicates with audiences beyond its core products.
According to an Apr. 2 announcement, the deal brings the Los Angeles-based program under OpenAI’s umbrella. Financial ter... [1563 chars]

title: Texas should plan for managing data center growth
description: Driven by the boom in artificial intelligence, Texas’ data center load is expected to more than double by 2028.
content:
As more data centers come online in Texas, conversations about how to plan for and oversee these facilities should be a priority for the 2027 legislative session.
Every chatbot response, photo stored in the cloud and text message sent depends on vast... [1949 chars]

title: Fertility Clinic Chain Leads the Way With AI-Powered Infertility Solutions
description: Infertility clinic chain Gaudium IVF and Women Health Limited has introduced artificial intelligence-led infertility treatment in India, integrating advanced embryology tools into routine clinical practice.

title: Google Confirms Texas Gas Plant Partnership for AI Datacenter Amid Revised Climate Strategy
description: Introduction Google confirmed plans for a partnership with a natural gas power plant to potentially power a new artificial intelligence datacenter in Texas, according to a report by the research group Cleanview. [1] The proposed 933-megawatt plant in Armstrong County, Texas, would emit an estimated 4.5 million tons of carbon dioxide (CO2) annually, officials said. [1] This move […]

title: AI startup Sarvam close to raising $300 million at $1.5 billion valuation
description: India’s homegrown artificial intelligence startup, Sarvam AI, is close to raising $300 million to $350 million as it seeks to build a domestic player that can compete with leaders from the US and China.

title: China Stocks Tumble Amid Global Tensions
description: China's stock market experienced another week of declines as investors expressed caution due to tensions in the Middle East. The CSI300 and Shanghai Composite Index fell, while artificial intelligence shares showed some resilience. Analysts remain concerned about oil supply and fluctuating demands affecting market stability.
content: China's stock market continued its downward trajectory this week, extending its slump for the third consecutive week. The decline comes as investors exercise caution amid the uncertain geopolitical climate in the Middle East, with the upcoming Qingmi... [563 chars]

title: Trump admin appeals ruling that blocked Pentagon action against Anthropic over AI dispute
description: The Trump administration is appealing a judge's order blocking the federal government from taking punitive measures against artificial intelligence company Anthropic after a dispute with the Pentagon over military use of AI.

title: Microsoft to invest $10 billion in Japan for AI and cyber defence expansion
description: Microsoft will invest ten billion dollars in Japan from 2026 to 2029. This investment will expand artificial intelligence infrastructure and boost cybersecurity cooperation. The plan includes training one million engineers and developers by 2030. Microsoft will partner with domestic firms to enhance AI computing capacity. This initiative aims to support Japan's technological growth and national security.

title: Microsoft to invest $10 billion in Japan for AI and cyber defence expansion
description: Microsoft on Friday said it will invest 1.6 trillion yen ($10 billion) in ​Japan between 2026 and 2029 to expand ‌artificial intelligence infrastructure and strengthen cybersecurity cooperation with the government.
